Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Understanding the Go Runtime: The Scheduler 132 upvotes, 19 comments
  2. E2E encrypted messaging on Instagram will no longer be supported after 8 May 35 upvotes, 3 comments
  3. Okmain: How to pick an OK main colour of an image 87 upvotes, 14 comments
  4. IMG_0416 (2024) 138 upvotes, 27 comments
  5. What we learned from a 22-Day storage bug (and how we fixed it) 13 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. Prefix sums at gigabytes per second with ARM NEON 54 upvotes, 8 comments
  7. Bubble Sorted Amen Break 361 upvotes, 107 comments
  8. Executing programs inside transformers with exponentially faster inference 178 upvotes, 49 comments
  9. Vite 8.0 Is Out 398 upvotes, 125 comments
  10. Run NanoClaw in Docker Sandboxes 10 upvotes, 0 comments
  11. Show HN: Algorithms and Data Structures in TypeScript – Free Book (~400 Pages) 24 upvotes, 3 comments
  12. Shall I implement it? No 1387 upvotes, 504 comments
  13. Malus – Clean Room as a Service 1341 upvotes, 492 comments
  14. Willingness to look stupid 483 upvotes, 168 comments
  15. I traced $2B in grants and 45 states' lobbying behind age‑verification bills 460 upvotes, 169 comments
  16. Ceno, browse the web without internet access 77 upvotes, 21 comments
  17. “This is not the computer for you” 652 upvotes, 259 comments
  18. Nanny state discovers Linux, demands it check kids' IDs before booting 32 upvotes, 7 comments
  19. Show HN: What was the world listening to? Music charts, 20 countries (1940–2025) 41 upvotes, 11 comments
  20. Enhancing gut-brain communication reversed cognitive decline in aging mice 340 upvotes, 155 comments
  21. Gvisor on Raspbian 20 upvotes, 4 comments
  22. Dijkstra's Crisis: The End of Algol and Beginning of Software Engineering (2010) [pdf] 10 upvotes, 1 comments
  23. Bucketsquatting is (finally) dead 176 upvotes, 85 comments
  24. TUI Studio – visual terminal UI design tool 124 upvotes, 61 comments
  25. An old photo of a large BBS (2022) 231 upvotes, 141 comments
  26. Prompt-caching – auto-injects Anthropic cache breakpoints (90% token savings) 42 upvotes, 21 comments
  27. Qatar helium shutdown puts chip supply chain on a two-week clock 49 upvotes, 36 comments
  28. Source code of Swedish e-government services has been leaked 120 upvotes, 105 comments
  29. ATMs didn’t kill bank teller jobs, but the iPhone did 460 upvotes, 476 comments
  30. Launch HN: Spine Swarm (YC S23) – AI agents that collaborate on a visual canvas 4 upvotes, 1 comments

Last generated 10:00pm, 13 March 2026. Source here.
